reviews.comment:
Fueron todo lo que estuvo bien en este día tan caótico para mi familia. Les agradezco la buena onda y la voluntad de darnos una gran mano. Muy agradecidos de encontrar en el camino gente como uds.🙌

(Translated by Google)
You were everything that was right on this chaotic day for my family. I appreciate your kindness and willingness to lend a helping hand. We're so grateful to have found people like you along the way.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0dXFXTExREAE

reviews.comment:
Impecable, amables, 2 dispensar de agua para .mate gratis, la nafta super hoy 31 de enero 789 pesos, más barata que en cualquier lugar. El pueblo todo parquedad, el pastor cortado en todo lugar. Que más? Para tener en cuenta.

(Translated by Google)
Impeccable, friendly, two free water dispensers for mate, premium gasoline today, January 31st, 789 pesos, cheaper than anywhere else. The town is very quiet, the grass is trimmed everywhere. What more could you ask for? Something to keep in mind.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0azVhcHFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Baños limpios , podes recargar agua caliente gratis, el kiosco tiene lo típico de estación de servicio y los precios muy caros como en todas. Hay un sector alejado donde se puede fumar un pucho y estirar las piernas.

(Translated by Google)
Clean restrooms, free hot water refills, the convenience store has the usual gas station supplies and prices are very high, like everywhere else. There's a secluded area where you can smoke and stretch your legs.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0M1p1WkFnEAE
